hooks.command: if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/autosave_session.py"; elif command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/autosave_session.py"; elif command -v py >/dev/null 2>&1; then py "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/autosave_session.py"; else true; fi
